E. 
MANVENDRA SINGH RATHORE AND ORS. VS. HIGH COURT 
OF RAJASTHAN AND ORS. [W.P.(C) No.484 OF 2024] & 
ALISHA KHAN VS. HIGH COURT OF RAJASTHAN AND 
ORS [W.P(C) No.494 of 2024]
25. The Petitioners in the present set of writ petitions were candidates in 
the Rajasthan Judicial Service Examination, 2024. The Respondent 
No.1 vide notification dated 09.04.2024 announced the Civil Judge 
Cadre Direct Recruitment Examination, 2024, specifying 222 
[2025] 4 S.C.R.  
261
In Re: Recruitment of Visually Impaired in Judicial Services
